name: The White House
subject: Resolute Reads
body:
1600 Daily REAL NEWS PRESIDENT TRUMP DOESN'T WANT YOU TO MISS

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=8c784f1e4776655d3d03f5c6a1441ba1c7e17e2c457369404361588acf6f86fe3d85ebf0d1f1e888b5abc230f5af70144b31c8db34efab12
Still Rising: Rasmussen Poll Shows Donald Trump Approval Ratings Now at 51 Percent

- Breitbart

This week, a new poll from Rasmussen tracking shows that a majority of likely U.S. voters approve of President Donald J. Trump’s job performance. President Trump’s approval rating sits at 51 percent—“according to Rasmussen, Obama was at 46 percent on April 4 of 2010, the second year of his presidency,” Breitbart reports.

-------------------------

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=8c784f1e4776655d08bad14c9dbacb3c315a7d4bc0e3ae086a07e771d228e4680af22bca9cebcc921e7567fa6e5595f4352be3e701b40b7c

FDA Commissioner Calls on Internet Providers to Help Police Opioid Offerings

- The Washington Post

Food and Drug Administration Commissioner Scott Gottlieb has “called on Internet providers to help rid the Web of illegal offers of prescription opioids and illicit drugs such as fentanyl that have contributed to the nation's drug crisis,” Lenny Bernstein and Elizabeth Dwoskin of The Washington Post write. Internet companies need to do more to find and remove such listings, Commissioner Gottlieb said.

-------------------------

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=8c784f1e4776655ddd59113640cc8b67467e8cf0e495a9abb8fcab6a59142c1ff89423d496e5a3c9cc74a3bc36ba14f552945824372c5e17

Leadership Is Here to Fight Opioids

-The Detroit News

U.S. Surgeon General Jerome Adams says that President Trump’s opioid initiative marks a “significant moment” in our country’s effort to reverse the drug crisis. “With the new opioid initiative, he is providing the leadership necessary to make serious headway in this battle,” the Surgeon General writes.

-------------------------

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=8c784f1e4776655dc8f3e395ab8acff7214a21b9dbd9b203b582c1105fbf373a97477ba36bf876d506d9e95140249acdd0ac7c292e8db6bb

Sessions Credits Trump with Stopping Migrant Caravan

- The Hill

On Wednesday, Attorney General Jeff Sessions “credited President Trump with halting a ‘caravan’ of migrants the president had warned were headed toward the U.S. border through Mexico,” The Hill reports. “Let me be clear as well: we will not accept the lawlessness of these types of efforts,” Attorney General Sessions said.

-------------------------

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=8c784f1e4776655df3bcccd45a2fa600bcc5af4526d97c890dacfc6eca74a5fe3975f56373915b122c7fe43a5aeacd04795017d5fb41ebe8

Wall Street Closes Higher As China Tariff Fears Ease

- Reuters

The three major Wall Street market indexes closed higher on Wednesday as the White House explained its position on trade with China. New National Economic Council Director Larry Kudlow said the Trump Administration is in a “negotiation” with China over tariffs and other issues, not a trade war.

-------------------------

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=8c784f1e4776655d83766c388a24f57503dd774f2cef7e5b71ff4fae75fa7b2d3ee8b3e70bda5b954a55fd5f2345038b5f0d2ddde595458a

A Common Sense Approach to the Census Citizenship Question

- The Hill

In an op-ed for The Hill, Rep. Lou Barletta (R-PA) outlines the hypocrisy of Democrats on immigration. The left opposes the Trump Administration’s decision to reinstate a question on citizenship status in the 2020 short-form census questionnaire. “How can you advocate for illegal immigrants if you aren’t willing to understand the very problem you are trying to solve?” Rep. Barletta asks.

-------------------------

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=8c784f1e4776655d1bf324faaa30128a5a01f8e18c1abcfd0f7cb4b708186bf9b6ccc6cd79790d446a1f4cda1420a0a8abcc3bc9f0df8b02

Trump Has Not Forgotten Rural America’s Needs, Contributions

- Lexington Herald Leader

“This past week, I hit the road for our third ‘Back to Our Roots’ RV tour, driving across Michigan, Ohio and now Kentucky,” Agriculture Secretary Sonny Perdue writes. “As always, these tours are an opportunity to escape the noise of Washington and hear directly from the American people.” Secretary Perdue said rural Americans care most about trade, the economy, jobs, and burdensome regulations.

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=8c784f1e4776655d59f0f1edaa99034d416905301e8315b032fe83cc746eee4bc190d54a0e50552d0bf955c85e3a7204cdc5a42b32413eb4
Privacy Policy |

Contact the White House |

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/unsub_center.aspx?qs=d453c42a6560d1d46f3f9965c75e7658d617efef5be139240c47b6e0a745c5ba7e6dfffdcc158b7acc1840fb3dfa19b8dd89b462fb724032602b313ac96a6d5d
Unsubscribe

name: Tom Perez
subject: Will you give me a chance to explain?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, www
body:
You have a role to play in shaping the Democratic Party's future, Derek.
---
Derek --

In just a moment I am going to ask you to make a monthly investment in the Democratic Party. I hope you let me explain why your commitment matters right now.

It's no secret we've been losing across the board since 2008 -- state legislatures, governorships, Congress, and the White House. For far too long, Democrats have poured our resources to the top of the ticket instead of organizing and investing in our state parties -- but all of that has ended on my watch.

Midterms are our chance to take back Congress, elect Democrats up and down the ballot, and build a winning infrastructure that will carry our party for years to come. We're in it for the long haul, but we cannot do it without you. That's why I am asking you directly:

**[Can I count on you to make a $3 monthly sustaining contribution? Donating monthly is one of the most effective ways to support Democrats running in competitive races across the country.](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/405224f9/4067b0a/5382589ac/7e4eeeef/4117146469/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/april-sustainer?recurring=true&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-++if+consinConsGroup29422+Youve+given+to+&utm_campaign=em_20180407_tp_nd&source=em_20180407_tp_nd&refcode=em_20180407_tp_nd")**

A monthly contribution is a commitment -- it allows our state parties and organizations on the ground to plan out their budgets from now until November knowing they have enough resources to take their message to voters and win elections.

More importantly, your support is a monthly reminder of the role you play in shaping the Democratic Party's future and our country's direction.

**[Make a $3 monthly sustaining contribution right now to support the Democratic Party's critical work this election cycle and beyond.](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/405224f9/4067b0a/5382589ac/7e4eeeec/4117146469/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/april-sustainer?recurring=true&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=2+-+Make+a++if+hpcraw+gt+350+50+elseif+hpcra&utm_campaign=em_20180407_tp_nd&source=em_20180407_tp_nd&refcode=em_20180407_tp_nd")**

Thanks for all you do,

Tom

Tom Perez
Chair
Democratic National Committee

Contributions or gifts to the Democratic National Committee are not tax deductible. Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, www.Democrats.org, and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, [update your contact information](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/405224f9/4067b0a/5382589ac/7e4eeeed/4117146469/VEsF/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/user/manage?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=3+-+update+your+contact+information&utm_campaign=em_20180407_tp_nd&source=em_20180407_tp_nd&refcode=em_20180407_tp_nd"). Our email list is the best way we have of staying in regular contact with supporters like you across the country and letting you know about the work Democrats are doing. If you like staying in touch, but want to receive only the most important messages, click [here](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/405224f9/4067b0a/5382589ac/7e4eeeea/4117146469/VEsC/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/signup/less-email?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=4+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20180407_tp_nd&source=em_20180407_tp_nd&refcode=em_20180407_tp_nd"). Click [here](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/405224f9/4067b0a/5382589ac/7e4eeeeb/4117146469/VEsD/ "http://www.democrats.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=5+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20180407_tp_nd&source=em_20180407_tp_nd&refcode=em_20180407_tp_nd") to unsubscribe from our supporter list, but if you leave, it will be harder for you to stay involved in the organization that you've been such a critical part of. This organization is powered by you, and we'd love to hear your ideas. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback [here](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/405224f9/4067b0a/5382589ac/7e4eeee8/4117146469/VEsA/ "http://my.democrats.org/page/s/contact-the-democrats?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=6+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20180407_tp_nd&source=em_20180407_tp_nd&refcode=em_20180407_tp_nd"), or just reply to this email! Thanks for supporting our party.

Derek,

This week, Tim officially kicked off his re-election campaign by traveling across Virginia to share this campaign's mission: building a Virginia that works **_for all_**. He spoke at more than 20 events, from rallies to roundtable discussions, to champion the values we're fighting for: access to good jobs, health care, education, security, and equality for every single Virginian.

But while Tim was traveling to every corner of the Commonwealth, spreading our inclusive and progressive message, **Corey Stewart -_one of the top Republicans running against Tim_ \- was telling his supporters that he knew exactly how to defeat Tim this November:**
"The Democrats are arrogant and cocky, and they think they've got Virginia. They think it's blue ... None of these Democrats is going to give Tim Kaine a dime because they don't think he needs it, and that's why we're going to sneak up on him and defeat him." \- Corey Stewart, during a campaign event
---
While some people may think Virginia isn't a battleground state anymore, we know better: **Republicans are still winning elections here in the Commonwealth, and if they have more resources than we do, they could win Tim 's Senate seat in November.** That's why we aren't taking a single thing for granted - and we hope you aren't, either.

[Show Corey Stewart and Republicans that they're wrong about Democrats not supporting our campaign: Chip in now >>](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1356/3e0906/62e3206a/3e34a50b/3315149849/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-2018?refcode=20180407_1_FR_TEAM_Stewart&amount=25")
